scripts.preinstall: node scripts/check-react-version.cjs || echo 'Warning: React version check script not found'
scripts.postinstall: node scripts/verify-react-version.cjs || echo 'Warning: React verification failed'
scripts.build: vite build && vite build --config vite.worker.config.ts && node fix-routes.js && node force-update.js
scripts.build:kr: vite build --mode kr && vite build --config vite.worker.config.ts && node fix-routes.js && node force-update.js
scripts.build:global: vite build --mode global && vite build --config vite.worker.config.ts && node fix-routes.js && node force-update.js
scripts.build:full: NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=2048' vite build && vite build --config vite.worker.config.ts && node fix-routes.js && node force-update.js
scripts.dev:wrangler: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist --d1=toss-live-commerce-db --local --ip 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.preview: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist --d1=toss-live-commerce-db --local --ip 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name ur-live --branch main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name ur-live --branch main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:global: npm run build:global && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name ur-live-global --branch main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:quick: vite build --config vite.worker.config.ts && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name ur-live --branch main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.pre-commit: npm run type-check && npm run check:conflicts && npm run validate:css && npm run build
scripts.db:reset: rm -rf .wrangler/state/v3/d1 && npm run db:migrate:local && npm run db:seed
scripts.git:init: git init && git add . && git commit -m 'Initial commit'
scripts.pre-deploy: npm run validate && npm run build
